title: Mega Showdown Legendary Spawns
description: This datapack adds many legendary Pokémon spawns with the existing models that come with the Mega Showdown mod
body:
This datapack adds many legendary spawns to your minecraft world. The datapack adds spawns to the legendaries models that come with mega showdown.

Currently no documentation on the spawns yet! (sorry)

If you need support or want to suggest something please join the Mega Showdown [Discord](https://discord.gg/3eB7Z7Pg9S) and go to this [forum](https://discord.com/channels/1334216416617824386/1384855316998520963)

Credits to "mcjohnjr" for helping update and maintain the datapack!
